description_long: This object consists of two identical, modern-style sofas placed side by side, each featuring a boxy silhouette with straight, clean lines. The sofas are upholstered in two shades of red, with the seat and back cushions displaying a subtle color block effect. Each sofa has two seat cushions and two backrest cushions, all of which are accented with small, evenly spaced button tufts. The armrests are broad, flat, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofas a robust and contemporary appearance. The base of the sofas is not visibly elevated, suggesting either very short or recessed legs. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements beyond the button tufting.
description: A pair of modern, boxy red sofas with color-blocked cushions and button tufting, featuring broad armrests and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both sofas side by side, highlighting the color-blocked seat and back cushions with button tufting and broad armrests.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the sofas, the thickness of the armrests, and the straight profile of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned backs of the sofas and the continuation of the color-blocked design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the sofa's depth and the solid, rectangular armrest profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each sofa has two seat cushions and two backrest cushions, all attached and uniform in size, with button tufting on the backrests.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, broad, flat, and straight, extending to the same height as the backrest with a boxy, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visibly exposed, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design, likely with short block-style supports at the corners.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is straight, medium height, segmented into two attached cushions per sofa, each with button tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid with a color-blocked effect between seat and back cushions, featuring smooth fabric and button tufting for subtle texture.
